LAW AND MOTION 302, MOTION NOTICE OF MOTION CONFIRMATION OF PARTITION ACCOUNTING & APPAISAL & RENDERING OF A FINAL DECISION ON PLTF'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION, ARGUED, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED, BUT STAYED. FILING OF LAWSUIT TOLLS PERIOD FOR DEFENDANT TO COMPLY WITH BUY IN PROVISION. HOWEVER COURT GRANTS DEFENDANT 54 DAYS WITHIN WHICH TO TENDER 25% OF THE VALUE OF PLAINTIFF'S EQUITY INTEREST AND OTHERWISE COMPLY WITH HOME PURCHASE AGREEMENT. IF NO TENDER COURT WILL ENTER ADJUDICATION FOR PARTITION. MOTION TO CONFIRM ACCOUNTING TO BE HEARD BY TRIAL JUDGE. DEFT STATEMENT DUE 5-7, PLTF RESPOND BY 5-14, DEFT TO RESPOND BY 5-21. ORDER GRTG PLTFF'S MOTION FOR SUMM ADJUD, BUT STAYING ITS ENFORCEMENT FOR 54 DAYS, WITH EXPRESS ALLOWANCE DURING THE STAY FOR DEFTS TO EXERCIXE HIS OPTION UNDER THE HOME OWNERSHIP AGREEMENT
